revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:14:21 on [[Template:Dab rcat see also]]
adapt columnization for both wide and narrow (mobile) devices
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:26:35 on [[Template:Dab rcat see also]]
adapt columnization for both wide and narrow (mobile) devices
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dab_rcat_see_also here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dab_rcat_see_also for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
[[:en:Ambiguity|Disambiguation]] rcat template family:
{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
* {{tl|R from ambiguous term}}
* {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}}
* {{tl|R from incorrect disambiguation}}
* {{tl|R from other disambiguation}}
* {{tl|R from predictable disambiguation}}
* {{tl|R from unnecessary disambiguation}}
* {{tl|R to disambiguation page}}
{{div col end}}
<hr width=70%>
{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
* [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]]
* [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation|WikiProject Disambiguation]]
* [[Wikipedia:Partially disambiguated page names|Partially disambiguated page names]] (essay)
* [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Redirect/Style guide|WikiProject Redirect/Style guide]]
{{div col end}}

{{R template index}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
